perksWithImages.name: Corrupt Intervention
perksWithImages.description: When the trial starts, the {Tunable.K15P01.GeneratorsBlocked} farthest Generators from you are blocked for {Tunable.K15P01.GeneratorBlockDuration}s, or until you down a Survivor.

perksWithImages.name: Septic Touch
perksWithImages.description:
While a Survivor within your Terror Radius is healing:
  • They gain {Keyword.Blindness}.
  • They gain {Keyword.Exhausted}.


When they stop healing, this ends after {Tunable.K28P03.BlindnessExhaustionDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Boon: Exponential
perksWithImages.description:
While next to a totem, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to bless it, creating a unique Boon totem that combines all your Boons.

Downed Survivors within the Boon's range:
  • Recover {Tunable.S29P03.RecoverSpeedBoost%}% faster.
  • Can fully recover.

perksWithImages.name: Tenacity
perksWithImages.description:
While downed:
  • You gain {Tunable.S12P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste}.
  • You can crawl and recover at the same time.
  • Your Grunts of Pain are {Tunable.S12P01.DyingVoiceLevelReduction%}% quieter.
